title: China calls for Strait to be reopened 'as soon as possible' in Iran talks
summary_full: Wang Yi is holding talks with Iran's foreign minister Aragchi who is on his first trip to China since the war began.
summary_public: Wang Yi is holding talks with Iran's foreign minister Aragchi who is on his first trip to China since the war began.
